nodes.title: what would you like to do next?
This 80-foot-tall waterfall on the coast of Big Sur in central California flows year-round from McWay Creek in Julia Pfeiffer Burns State Park.
Julia Pfeiffer Burns Beach, Big Sur, California
Enjoy a relaxing day at the beach at this state park, just 12 miles south of Pfeiffer Big Sur State Park on California's Pacific coast.
Garrapata State Park is a state park of California, USA, located on California State Route 1, 6.7 miles south of Carmel and 18 miles north of Big Sur Village.
One of the most photographed bridges in California, this iconic concrete arch spans the deep canyon of Bixby Creek with stunning views of the Pacific coastline.
Julia Pfeiffer Burns State Park, Big Sur, California
This 80-foot-tall waterfall on the coast of Big Sur in central California flows year-round from McWay Creek in Julia Pfeiffer Burns State Park, about 37 miles south of Carmel.

The trail to McWay Falls is an easy walk from the parking lot off HWY 1 and boasts breathtaking views of the Pacific Ocean. The waterfall is one of only two in California that flow directly into the ocean.

Use the Sidekick to transform your ideas into prototypes, using the look and feel of your product.

1. Select the prototype
  2. Choose a quick prompt or write your own
  3. Refine and iterate with AI
  4. Apply to Canvas to edit, share, and continue creating your next big idea
Pro tip: The more details you add to your prompt, the better your results will be.
